name: Planes v2 Schema + Cross-File Validator Layer
descriptions: Implement strict schema and cross-file invariant validators for split-file Planes v2.
success_criteria: All required cross-file invariants enforced in strict mode with explicit permissive policy boundaries.

hard_no_go_conditions: any listed invariant lacks failing test
strict mode allows invalid cross-file state
required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_schema_validation or planes_cross_file_invariants" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_schema_validation or planes_cross_file_invariants" -q
